description: Case style: Analog watch with a rounded stainless steel case for enhanced durabilityDial style: Red dial with metallic handsStrap style: Black genuine leather strap with a white stitch and tang clasp for comfort and styleFeatures: Branding on the 6 hour mark on the dialScrew to reset timeWater resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to wear it out while swimming but not poolside diving, snorkelling or water SportsWarranty: 2 years (1 year for digital and ana-digital watches)
